status_history.message: Retrying Try-On generation after quality verifier found a system artifact.

checks.name: workflow_input_shape
checks.message: Try-On workflow retained both user inputs through generation.

checks.name: generated_artifact_reference
checks.message: Generated result retains an internal backend artifact reference for verification.

checks.name: generated_artifact_non_empty
checks.message: Generated artifact bytes were loaded successfully from backend storage.

checks.name: generated_artifact_size_sanity
checks.message: Generated artifact size passed the deterministic backend sanity threshold.

checks.name: generation_backend_trace
checks.message: Quality verifier recorded backend generation mode vertex_virtual_try_on.

checks.name: visual_category_face
checks.message: The face of the human model is perfectly preserved from the original human photo in the generated image.

checks.name: visual_category_body_pose
checks.message: The body proportions and pose of the human model are accurately maintained, matching the original human photo.

checks.name: visual_category_garment_details
checks.message: The generated shirt accurately replicates the single chest pocket, collar type, button-front closure, long sleeves, and overall silhouette of the source garment photo. There are no missing or distorted key details.

checks.name: visual_category_color
checks.message: The dark blue color of the garment in the generated image is a faithful reproduction of the color shown in the source garment photo.

checks.name: visual_category_texture
checks.message: The smooth, cotton-like texture of the garment from the source photo is well-represented in the generated image, showing natural fabric folds.

checks.name: visual_category_anatomy
checks.message: All visible anatomy, including hands, neck, and general limb structure, appears natural and free from distortion or artifacts.

checks.name: visual_category_background
checks.message: The background in the generated image remains consistent with the neutral white/light gray background of the original human photo.

checks.name: visual_category_realism
checks.message: The integration of the garment onto the human model is highly realistic, with natural draping and lighting, making it appear as a real photograph.

checks.name: model_backed_verdict
checks.message: The virtual try-on successfully rendered the dark blue shirt onto the model, preserving human identity, pose, and all key garment details like color, texture, and the single chest pocket. The overall realism is high, with no apparent defects.

result.stylist_note: Your virtual try-on was successfully completed using Vertex Virtual Try-On, delivering a high-quality result.
